zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas III de Clayton於大約1440年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓時，他的父親Sir John VI de Clayton22歲，母親Mary Mainwaring22歲。他於大約1464年與Jane Clifton在英國藍卡爾克雷頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1470年在他的家鄉享年31歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾利藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas III de Clayton于大约1440年出生在英国藍卡爾克雷頓时，他的父亲Sir John VI de Clayton22岁，母亲Mary Mainwaring22岁。他于大约1464年与Jane Clifton在英国藍卡爾克雷頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1470年在他的家乡享年31岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾利藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas III de Clayton was born about 1440, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John VI de Clayton, was 22 and his mother, Mary Mainwaring, was 22. He married Jane Clifton about 1464, in Clayton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1470, in his hometown, at the age of 31, and was buried in Leyland, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas III de Clayton est né environ 1440, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John VI de Clayton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Mainwaring, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jane Clifton environ 1464, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1470, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas III de Clayton um 1440 in Clayton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John VI de Clayton 22 und seine Mutter Mary Mainwaring 22. Er hat um 1464 in Clayton, Lancashire, England Jane Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Leyland, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas III de Clayton è nato il circa 1440 nel Clayton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John VI de Clayton, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mary Mainwaring, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Jane Clifton circa 1464, nel Clayton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1470, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Leyland, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas III de Claytonが約1440年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンで生まれた時，父Sir John VI de Claytonは22歳，母Mary Mainwaringは22歳であった。約1464年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンでJane Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1470年に故郷で31歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアリーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas III de Clayton(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John VI de Clayton(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Mainwaring(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1464년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 Jane Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1470년 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas III de Clayton nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John VI de Clayton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mary Mainwaring, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Clifton aproximadamente 1464, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1470, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas III de Clayton родился около 1440 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John VI de Clayton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Mainwaring, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Clifton около 1464 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1470 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas III de Clayton nació aproximadamente 1440, en Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John VI de Clayton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Mainwaring, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jane Clifton aproximadamente 1464, en Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1470, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
